componentLayers.name: shared-ui
componentLayers.definition: Reusable component that can be used across pages, routes, or projects without owning app data, fetching, routing, analytics, or persistence.

componentLayers.name: section
componentLayers.definition: Page or screen section composed of smaller shared components.

componentLayers.name: layout
componentLayers.definition: Component responsible for page, screen, or container structure.

componentLayers.name: data-driven
componentLayers.definition: Component renders supplied structured data or schema-driven content without owning fetch or persistence unless explicitly app-specific.

componentLayers.name: app-specific
componentLayers.definition: Component knows app domain, routing, API, cart, analytics, auth, or product-specific infrastructure.

componentLayers.name: workflow
componentLayers.definition: Component manages multi-step interaction, domain-specific states, validation, or process behavior.
